arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca, Man Utd, Jamie Vardy and romance in football - every word from Ruud van Nistelrooy - Leicestershire Live
arts.sum: The former Manchester United striker was asked about all manner of subjects, from his time as interim boss at Old Trafford, all the way back to a message he sent Jamie Vardy nine years ago. To be managing this club and this group of players and representing Leicester City in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: West Ham may need to worry after manager claims – Nantes could beat Hammers to it
arts.sum: West Ham United may need to worry as managerial target Sergio Conceição could now be targeted by Nantes. That’s according to Ouest France, who report that the French club, in particular president Waldemar Kita, has ‘decided to bring back Sergio Conceição’. arts.ttl: Is Van Nistelrooy the right manager to keep Leicester up?
arts.sum: Mark Chapman is joined by Shay Given, Chris Sutton and Rory Smith on the Monday Night Club to discuss Leicester City's appointment of Ruud van Nistelrooy.

arts.ttl: “Too much quality” | Alan Pardew backs West Ham to stay up
arts.sum: Former West Ham manager Alan Pardew was “hurting” after the 5-2 defeat to Arsenal on Saturday afternoon, however, he expects the Hammers to stay up this season. Speaking on talkSPORT on Sunday, the 63-year-old put the result and the Hammers season into question. He said: “It was hurting to hear that scoreline. And that stadium,... arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy 'hurt' by Man United exit
arts.sum: Ruud van Nistelrooy was disappointed to leave Manchester United after his spell as interim coach but said he understands Ruben Amorim's decision.
